meaning: n.扩充,开展,膨胀,扩张物,辽阔,浩瀚
examples: The company intends a slow-down in expansion.
Poor trading figures put back our plans for expansion.
The company is forging ahead with its plans for expansion.
Most models of inflation suggest the expansion would have been accompanied by ripples of gravitational energy.
When the expansion is done, 2 million passengers are expected to use the metro daily.
